title: _Nonnull return annotation violated by lichen_meshcore_adapter_get_stats
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/include/lichen/meshcore/adapter.h
Line: 164-166

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/adapter.c
Line: 1253-1258

The header declares the function as returning _Nonnull:
```c
const struct lichen_meshcore_adapter_stats *_Nonnull
lichen_meshcore_adapter_get_stats(
    const struct lichen_meshcore_adapter *_Nonnull adapter);
```

But the implementation can return NULL:
```c
return adapter == NULL ? NULL : &adapter->stats;
```

This violates the API contract. Callers trusting the _Nonnull annotation could dereference NULL.

Fix: Either remove the _Nonnull annotation on return type, or assert/crash if adapter is NULL instead of returning NULL.
notes:
Commit: d0fa0ff39
Matched _Nonnull on return type in adapter.c definition to header declaration (no longer returns NULL). Other NULL-handling functions use explicit checks as per file conventions.
close_reason: Matched _Nonnull annotation on return type in function definition. Implementation no longer returns NULL, satisfying contract (adapter param is also _Nonnull).
